chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 2222 of 2026 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ Priority. 1. For hearing of CMA No. 8919/26. 2. For hearing of Main Case. 27.04.2026 Mr. Rana Sakhawat Ali, Advocate for the Petitioner. ---------- Mr. Agha Shahid Majeed Khan, Advocate files Vakalatnama along with comments, which are taken on record. Learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that the goods imported by the Petitioner under GD No. KAPE-HC-50916 dated 27.01.2026 are not being cleared and GD is not being assessed. Learned counsel appearing on behalf of the department undertakes that the needful would be done in accordance with law within a period of 10 days from today. In view of such statement, the purpose of this Petition has been served. The Petition stands disposed of accordingly with listed application. Judge Judge Ayaz
